name: Fontleroy
description: Font manager for NextUI. Browse, preview, and install system fonts on TrimUI Brick and Smart Pro.
author: Eric Reinsmidt

changelog.v0.1.0: Initial release. Browse bundled and user fonts, live preview with sample text, install as system font, backup and restore original.
changelog.v0.2.0: Add system preview mode with interactive NextUI menu mock, marquee scrolling for long names, and softer specimen background.
